text: Cause: six stale, gitignored, disposable `.container-state` profiles from YESTERDAY's labs (2026-07-02), each carrying a ~2.4GB Rust target cache, ~15GB total. No live container is using them (runs were sequential and exited): [...] May I `rm -rf` those six dated 2026-07-02 profiles to reclaim ~13GB and unblock? They're gitignored disposable build caches, but they aren't mine to delete so I'm confirming first. Reply "go" and I'll proceed.
